# Summary

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature/story
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build` passes locally
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes locally
- [ ] Docker compose validation passes if touched
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed

## Financial data / privacy checklist

- [ ] No real bank statements committed
- [ ] No account numbers, card numbers, ID numbers, or raw PII committed
- [ ] No raw statement text sent to AI prompts
- [ ] Logs do not contain sensitive financial data
